body_text:
25:16 √¢¬Ä¬î July 21, 2025
Update to the Deposit Processing Part
We incorporated Branch Capture procedures and Branch Capture workflow and user type descriptions into the Deposit Processing Part, along with other editorial changes. The related Branch Capture user guides were made obsolete.
We also incorporated the Corporate Capture workflow and user type descriptions into the Part and obsoleted the user guide. We renamed and updated the Corporate Capture Business Customer Enrollment and Maintenance Request, Form 8996, and added completion instructions to the Part.
Clearing and Deposits Volume
Deposit Processing Part
Section 1.2, Contacts, Websites, and Other Resources
Added contact information for Paystation.
Section 5.2, Determining if Items Are Acceptable for Deposit in Branch Capture
Updated general guidance. Consolidated related content for processing (non-US) foreign cheques into the section.
Section 5.3, Determining if Items Are Acceptable for Deposit in Corporate Capture
Updated general guidance.
Chapter 6, Branch Capture and Corporate Capture Scanner Procurement
Moved scanner procurement content into its own chapter. Added a note that the CR-80 model is no longer supported by Canon.
Chapter 7, Branch Capture Scanner Testing, Maintenance, and Troubleshooting
Consolidated related content into one chapter.
Chapter 8, Branch Capture User Management
New chapter. Consolidated Branch Capture user management procedures. Incorporated content from Branch Capture User Role Combinations, Form 5941.
Chapter 9, Depositing Cheques in Branch Capture
Incorporated procedures for creating, reviewing, editing, correcting, balancing, completing, searching for, viewing, and deleting Branch Capture deposits and deposit items. Incorporated content from Branch Capture √¢¬Ä¬ì Capture User Guide, Form 5914.
Chapter 10, Disapproving or Approving a Branch Capture Deposit
New chapter. Incorporated content from Branch Capture √¢¬Ä¬ì Reviewer User Guide, Form 5926.
Chapter 11, Transmitting a Branch Capture Deposit
New chapter. Incorporated related content from Branch Capture √¢¬Ä¬ì Supervisor User Guide, Form 5927, into this chapter.
Chapter 12, Assigning a Branch Capture Deposit and Managing Aged Open Deposits.
New chapter. Incorporated related content from Branch Capture √¢¬Ä¬ì Supervisor User Guide, Form 5927.
Chapter 13, Branch Capture Reports and Research
New chapter. Incorporated content from Branch Capture √¢¬Ä¬ì Reports and Research User Guide, Form 5925, and Branch Capture √¢¬Ä¬ì Supervisor User Guide, Form 5927.
Section 14.1, Overview of Mobile Deposits
Added a note that Mobile Deposits are monitored in Central 1√¢¬Ä¬ôs Enterprise Fraud Management System (EFM).
Section 15.3, Corporate Capture Workflows and User Types
New section. Incorporated content from Corporate Capture
User Role Combinations, Form 5936.
Section 15.4, Enrolling and Managing Corporate Capture Business Customers
Added completion instructions for Corporate Capture Business Customer Enrollment and Maintenance Request, Form 8996, and instructions for submitting the form for processing in ServiceNow. We added a note that financial institutions must have already implemented Corporate Capture to use the form, and requests are subject to fees.
Section 18.9 Branch Capture Reports
Minor updates to report titles and descriptions.
Section 18.10 Corporate Capture Reports
Minor updates to report titles and descriptions.
